notes: Sync overhaul + ticket-number fix. (1) Cloud sync no longer freezes the window — the profile/config/mod sync now runs off the UI thread, so MegaLoad stays responsive while it works in the background. (2) Two synced devices no longer ping-pong: a quirk where the change-detector keyed off the machine ID made every 30s poll trigger a full pull and mod reinstall — that's gone, so sync is far less frequent and invasive. (3) Configs now reliably copy device-to-device (pulled files get their edit-time restamped so the next sync stops skipping them). Mods only reinstall when genuinely missing, idle polls do near-zero network, and the mod-set merge now favours the device that last edited it rather than the one that pushed last. (4) MegaBugs ticket numbers now use Australia/Sydney local time instead of UTC. Tickets 20260602-231641-9f315489 and 20260602-231314-56fe2afd.
